- `Height`: string — Inline CSS height — only used by Rect/Circle variants. Optional.
- `Lines`: int = 1 — Number of text lines (Text variant only). Default 1.
- `Variant`: SkeletonVariant {Text | Rect | Circle} = Text — Placeholder shape (Text default): Text (line/paragraph), Rect (block), or Circle.
- `Width`: string — Inline CSS width — e.g. "100%", "240px", "12rem". Optional.

### OmniSparkline
Mini chart inline em SVG — pra trends rápidos em Stat cards, células de tabela, headers de listas, parágrafos de texto.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniSparkline.razor_

Parameters:
- `AreaOpacity`: double = 0.18 — Fill opacity for Area variant. 0–1, default 0.18.
- `AriaLabel`: string — aria-label override. Defaults to "Sparkline".
- `BarGap`: double = 2 — Spacing between bars/columns in PIXELS. Default 2.
- `Color`: string — Stroke/fill color (any CSS color). Defaults to --omni-accent.
- `Data`: IEnumerable<double> — Sequence of numbers to chart. Empty/null = nothing rendered.
- `PieInnerRadius`: double = 0 — Raio interno do donut em Pie (0–0.9 do raio externo). 0 = pie sólido, 0.5 = donut médio. Default 0 (pie).
- `PiePalette`: IReadOnlyList<string> — Paleta de cores pro variant Pie. Se vazia, usa accent com variação de opacidade pra distinguir slices. Cores são repetidas ciclicamente se houver mais valores que cores.
- `ShowAllMarkers`: bool = false — Show dots at ALL data points (Line/Area only). Sobrescreve ShowMarker — se true, marca todos.
- `ShowMarker`: bool = false — Show a dot at the LAST data point (Line/Area only).
- `Smooth`: bool = false — Suaviza a curva (Line/Area) usando monotone cubic Bezier — preserva monotonicidade dos dados (não inventa picos/vales). Mesmo algoritmo que RadzenLineSeries Smooth="true" usa. Não tem efeito em Column/Bar/Pie. Default false.
- `StrokeWidth`: double = 1.8 — Stroke width em PIXELS. Default 1.8.
- `Variant`: SparklineVariant {Line | Area | Column | Bar | Pie} = Line — Visual variant — Line, Area, Column, Bar, Pie.

### OmniSpinner
Pure-CSS circular spinner.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniSpinner.razor_

Parameters:
- `Label`: string — Accessible label for screen readers (aria-label). Defaults to "Carregando".
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Spinner size (Md default): Sm, Md, Lg, or Xl.

### OmniStat
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniStat.razor_

Parameters:
- `Card`: bool = false — Wraps the stat in a bordered card surface.
- `Delta`: string — Trend delta (e.g. "+18,4%"). Colour follows DeltaDown.
- `DeltaCaption`: string — Neutral caption after the delta (e.g. "vs ontem").
- `DeltaDown`: bool = false — Renders the delta in the "down" colour.
- `Icon`: string — Optional icon shown in a chip next to the label.
- `Label`: string — Uppercase label above the value.
- `Value`: string *required* =  — The metric value (large).
Slots:
- `Visual`: RenderFragment — Decorative visual (e.g. a sparkline) anchored to the bottom-right.

### OmniStatGroup
Responsive KPI strip — lays out a set of OmniStat cards in an even grid that collapses (Columns → 2 → 1) as the container narrows (container query, so it reacts to its own width, not the viewport).
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniStatGroup.razor_

Parameters:
- `Columns`: int = 4 — Desired columns on wide containers. Collapses to 2 then 1 as it narrows. Default 4.

### OmniStatusBadge
Pílula compacta de status — primitivo do design system para indicar estado operacional (caixa aberto, API online, sincronizando, fila vazia, etc.).
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniStatusBadge.razor_

Parameters:
- `AriaLabel`: string — Sinaliza ao screen-reader o significado do estado.
- `Kind`: StatusBadgeKind {Neutral | Accent | Good | Warn | Danger} = Neutral — Intent semântico do estado.
- `Label`: string — Rótulo principal — destacado na cor do Kind.
- `Meta`: string — Texto secundário (relógio, contador, percentual) — renderizado em monoespaçada apagada, separado do label por "·".
- `Pulse`: bool = false — Anel pulsante no dot — use para indicar "ao vivo".
Slots:
- `ChildContent`: RenderFragment — Conteúdo livre — alternativa ao parâmetro Label.

### OmniTimeline
OmniTimeline — vertical/horizontal sequence of events along a connecting line, inspired by RadzenTimeline.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniTimeline.razor_

Parameters:
- `LinePosition`: TimelineLinePosition {Center | Start | End | Alternate} = Center — Where the line sits relative to content (Center/Start/End/Alternate).
- `Orientation`: Orientation {Horizontal | Vertical} = Vertical — Vertical (column, default) or Horizontal (row) flow.
- `Reverse`: bool = false — Reverses the visual side of content (swaps opposite/main).

### OmniTimelineItem
A single event on an <OmniTimeline>.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniTimelineItem.razor_

Parameters:
- `Label`: string — Opposite-side text shorthand (rendered after LabelContent).
- `PointSize`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Point size. Default Md.
- `PointStyle`: TimelinePointStyle {Base | Accent | Good | Warn | Danger | Info} = Base — Color/intent of the point. Default Base.
- `PointVariant`: TimelinePointVariant {Filled | Outlined | Text} = Filled — Fill variant of the point. Default Filled.
- `Text`: string — Main content text shorthand (rendered after ChildContent).
Slots:
- `ChildContent`: RenderFragment — Main content. Rendered before Text.
- `LabelContent`: RenderFragment — Opposite-side content (date/label). Rendered before Label.
- `PointContent`: RenderFragment — Content rendered inside the dot (icon, letter, avatar…).

## Forms

### OmniValidationMessage
Per-field error display.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Forms/OmniValidationMessage.razor_

Parameters:
- `For`: Expression<Func<TValue>> *required* — Lambda pointing at the field, e.g. () => model.Email.
- `ShowAll`: bool — Render all messages (default) or just the first.

### OmniValidationSummary
Styled validation summary — like Blazor's <ValidationSummary> but uses the `omni-alert omni-alert-danger` look.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Forms/OmniValidationSummary.razor_

Parameters:
- `Title`: string = Corrija os erros abaixo: — Heading shown above the error list; null/empty hides it. Default "Corrija os erros abaixo:".

## Inputs

### OmniAutoComplete
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniAutoComplete.razor_

Parameters:
- `Clearable`: bool — Show a clear (×) button when a value is selected. Default true.
- `DebounceMs`: int — Debounce window for async LoadData calls. Default 220ms.
- `EmptyText`: string — Text shown in the dropdown when no results match. Default "Nenhum resultado.".
- `Items`: IEnumerable<TItem> — Synchronous item source. Use this OR LoadData, not both.
- `LoadData`: Func<string, Task<IEnumerable<TItem>>> — Async item source — called whenever the search text changes (debounced).
- `MinSearchLength`: int — Minimum characters before searching. Default 0 (show all on focus).
- `Placeholder`: string — Placeholder text shown in the search input. Default "Buscar...".
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} — Visual size of the input. Default Md.
- `TextSelector`: Func<TItem, string> *required* — Required: how to extract the display text from an item.
Slots:
- `ItemTemplate`: RenderFragment<TItem> (context: TItem) — Optional template rendered for each option in the dropdown.

### OmniCalendar
Calendar grid.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniCalendar.razor_

Parameters:
- `AutoFocus`: bool = false — Auto-focus the grid on first render so keyboard nav works without a click. Set to false when the calendar is rendered statically on the page (Inline mode without an opening trigger).
- `DateRender`: Action<DateRenderEventArgs> — Per-day render hook. Lets the consumer add a CSS class, set HTML attributes, or mark a date disabled — without touching the bound model. Mirrors Radzen's DateRender callback. Use it for holiday highlights, tooltips, anniversary markers, etc.
- `DisableWeekends`: bool = false — When true, Saturdays and Sundays are disabled. Default false.
- `DisabledDates`: Func<DateOnly, bool> — Predicate returning true to disable a specific day. Default null (none disabled).
- `FirstDayOfWeek`: DayOfWeek {Sunday | Monday | Tuesday | Wednesday | Thursday | Friday | Saturday} — Which day starts the week. null respects the current culture (default for pt-BR is Sunday). Set explicitly for Monday-start in EU formats.
- `InitialViewDate`: DateOnly — Initial month/year to show when the calendar first mounts. Wins over Selected on the first render but does not override later navigation by the user.
- `MaxDate`: DateOnly — Latest selectable day; days after it are disabled.
- `MinDate`: DateOnly — Earliest selectable day; days before it are disabled.
- `RangeEnd`: DateOnly — End of the committed range; when both endpoints are set the band between them is painted solid.
- `RangeHoverEnd`: DateOnly — Tentative end of range under the mouse pointer. When set together with RangeStart (and RangeEnd is null), the calendar paints a preview band between start and this day so the user can see the candidate range before committing.
- `RangeStart`: DateOnly — Optional range — used by the date-range variant for hover/selection visuals.
- `Selected`: DateOnly — Currently selected single date. (Range mode handled by parent.)
- `ShowNavButtons`: bool = true — Show the prev/next month navigation chevrons. Default true.
- `ShowNextButton`: bool = true — Show the "next month" chevron. Useful to hide one side in a two-month layout.
- `ShowPrevButton`: bool = true — Show the "previous month" chevron. Useful to hide one side in a two-month layout.
- `ShowWeekNumbers`: bool = false — Show the ISO 8601 week number column on the left of the grid.
- `ViewMonth`: DateOnly — Month being displayed. Defaults to today's month (or Selected's month).
Events:
- `OnDateSelected`: EventCallback<DateOnly> — Fires when the user picks a day (click or keyboard Enter/Space) that passes the disabled checks.
- `OnDayHover`: EventCallback<DateOnly> — Fires as the mouse moves over (or leaves) day cells. Receives null on leave.
- `OnEscape`: EventCallback — Fires when the user presses Escape on the grid.
- `ViewMonthChanged`: EventCallback<DateOnly> — Fires when the displayed month changes (navigation, year pick, or keyboard paging).
Slots:
- `Footer`: RenderFragment — Slot rendered below the day grid (e.g. a "Today" button).

### OmniCheckBox
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniCheckBox.razor_

Parameters:
- `Label`: string — Text label shown next to the checkbox when no ChildContent is provided.
Slots:
- `ChildContent`: RenderFragment — Custom label content; rendered instead of Label when provided.

### OmniCheckBoxList
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniCheckBoxList.razor_

Parameters:
- `AriaLabel`: string — aria-label do grupo.
- `DescriptionSelector`: Func<TValue, string> — Texto auxiliar opcional abaixo do label.
- `DisabledSelector`: Func<TValue, bool> — Item-by-item: retorne true para desabilitar este item específico.
- `Items`: IEnumerable<TValue> — Conjunto de itens a renderizar.
- `Orientation`: Orientation {Horizontal | Vertical} — Orientação do layout. Default Vertical.
- `TextSelector`: Func<TValue, string> — Texto principal de cada item. Default = item.ToString().
- `ValueSelector`: Func<TValue, TValue> — Extrai o valor a usar no bind. Default = o próprio item.
Slots:
- `ChildContent`: RenderFragment — Conteúdo customizado adicional (renderizado APÓS os itens).

### OmniColorPicker
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniColorPicker.razor_

Parameters:
- `DefaultColor`: string = #d97706 — Cor usada quando Value é nulo/ inválido. Default #d97706 (amber).
- `Palette`: IEnumerable<string> — Cores de preset exibidas abaixo do seletor. Default = paleta do design system.
- `ShowAlpha`: bool = false — Habilita o slider de transparência e emite #rrggbbaa. Default false.
- `ShowInput`: bool = true — Mostra o campo de entrada hexadecimal. Default true.
- `ShowPresets`: bool = true — Mostra a paleta de presets. Default true.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Tamanho do trigger. Default Md (igual aos demais inputs).

### OmniDatePicker
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniDatePicker.razor_

Parameters:
- `Clearable`: bool — Show a clear (×) button when a value is set. Default true.
- `DateFormat`: string — Date/time format used for display and parsing. Default "dd/MM/yyyy" (adapts when ShowTime is on).
- `DateRender`: Action<DateRenderEventArgs> — Per-day render hook (holidays, special markers, tooltips, ad-hoc disabling).
- `DisableWeekends`: bool — Disable Saturdays and Sundays. Default false.
- `DisabledDates`: Func<DateOnly, bool> — Predicate returning true to disable a specific day. Default null (none disabled).
- `FirstDayOfWeek`: DayOfWeek {Sunday | Monday | Tuesday | Wednesday | Thursday | Friday | Saturday} — Override the first day of the week. Default = current culture.
- `HourFormat`: string — "24" (default) or "12" with AM/PM toggle.
- `InitialViewDate`: DateOnly — Month/year shown the first time the popover opens.
- `Inline`: bool — Render the calendar in place (no input/popover). Useful for filter panels or sidebars.
- `MaxDate`: DateOnly — Latest selectable date; later days are disabled.
- `MinDate`: DateOnly — Earliest selectable date; earlier days are disabled.
- `MinutesStep`: int — Step for minutes spinner. Default 1.
- `ParseInput`: Func<string, DateTime> — Custom string-to-DateTime parser. When set, replaces the default DateOnly.TryParseExact(DateFormat). Return null for invalid inputs. Useful for accepting multiple formats or natural-language dates.
- `Placeholder`: string — Placeholder text for the input; falls back to a smart format-based default when null.
- `SecondsStep`: int — Step for seconds spinner. Default 1.
- `ShowSeconds`: bool — Show the seconds field next to hour/minute.
- `ShowTime`: bool — Show hour/minute selector below the calendar (or alone when ShowTimeOnly).
- `ShowTimeOnly`: bool — Hide the calendar — picker shows time only. Auto-true when TValue is TimeOnly.
- `ShowWeekNumbers`: bool — Show the ISO 8601 week number column.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} — Visual size of the input. Default Md.
Slots:
- `Footer`: RenderFragment — Slot rendered below the day grid (e.g. a "Hoje" button).

### OmniDateRangePicker
Date range picker with a single combined input.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniDateRangePicker.razor_

Parameters:
- `ApplyText`: string = Aplicar — Label for the apply button (shown when AutoApply is off). Default "Aplicar".
- `AutoApply`: bool = true — When true (default), the second click on a day commits and closes the picker immediately. When false, the popover stays open and Apply / Cancel buttons are shown so the user can preview before committing.
- `CancelText`: string = Cancelar — Label for the cancel button (shown when AutoApply is off). Default "Cancelar".
- `ClearText`: string = Limpar — Label for the clear button. Default "Limpar".
- `DateFormat`: string = dd/MM/yyyy — Format used to display the From/To dates in the input. Default "dd/MM/yyyy".
- `DateRender`: Action<DateRenderEventArgs> — Per-day render hook applied to both calendars (holidays, markers, tooltips).
- `DisableWeekends`: bool = false — Disable Saturdays and Sundays on both calendars. Default false.
- `Disabled`: bool = false — Disables the whole control. Default false.
- `DisabledDates`: Func<DateOnly, bool> — Predicate returning true to disable a specific day on both calendars. Default null.
- `FirstDayOfWeek`: DayOfWeek {Sunday | Monday | Tuesday | Wednesday | Thursday | Friday | Saturday} — Override the first day of the week on both calendars.
- `From`: DateOnly — Start of the selected range. Bind via @bind-From.
- `FromExpression`: Expression<Func<DateOnly>> — Expression para integração com EditContext (registra com OmniForm). Aponte pro campo From do model; o validator vai receber o tuple (From, To).
- `MaxDate`: DateOnly — Latest selectable date on both calendars; later days are disabled.
- `MinDate`: DateOnly — Earliest selectable date on both calendars; earlier days are disabled.
- `Name`: string — Nome lógico — registra com OmniForm para validators irmãos. (<OmniRequiredValidator Component="periodo" />)
- `Placeholder`: string = Selecionar período — Text shown in the input when no range is selected. Default "Selecionar período".
- `Presets`: IReadOnlyList<DateRangePreset> — Quick-select shortcuts shown in the popover sidebar. Each preset is a label plus a function returning the (from, to) tuple at the moment it's clicked. Default set covers the most common business reporting periods.
- `ShowClearButton`: bool = true — Show the "Limpar" button in the popover footer.
- `ShowWeekNumbers`: bool = false — Show the ISO 8601 week number column on both calendars.
- `To`: DateOnly — End of the selected range. Bind via @bind-To.
Events:
- `FromChanged`: EventCallback<DateOnly> — Fires when the range start changes. Two-way via @bind-From.
- `ToChanged`: EventCallback<DateOnly> — Fires when the range end changes. Two-way via @bind-To.

### OmniFileUpload
Drag-and-drop file uploader.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniFileUpload.razor_

Parameters:
- `Accept`: string — HTML accept filter passed to the file input (e.g. "image/*", ".pdf").
- `FilesExpression`: Expression<Func<IReadOnlyList<IBrowserFile>>> — Expression apontando pra coleção de files no model — habilita validators irmãos. Ex: FilesExpression="@(() => model.Anexos)".
- `HintText`: string — Secondary hint under the label. When null, an auto hint listing Accept + max size is shown.
- `LabelText`: string = Arraste arquivos aqui ou clique para selecionar — Main text shown inside the drop-zone. Default "Arraste arquivos aqui ou clique para selecionar".
- `MaxFileCount`: int = 0 — Maximum number of files (Multiple only). 0 = no limit.
- `MaxFileSize`: long = 10485760 — Maximum size per file, in bytes. 0 = no limit. Default 10 MB.
- `Multiple`: bool = false — Allow selecting/dropping more than one file. Default false (single file replaces the previous).
- `Name`: string — Nome lógico — registra com OmniForm para validators irmãos.
Events:
- `OnFileRemoved`: EventCallback<IBrowserFile> — Fires when a file is removed from the list, with the removed file.
- `OnFilesSelected`: EventCallback<IReadOnlyList<IBrowserFile>> — Fires after files are added (validated), with the current accepted file list.

### OmniFormField
Field wrapper around an input.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniFormField.razor_

Parameters:
- `Error`: string — Explicit error to display (wins over EditContext messages).
- `For`: string — HTML `for` attribute on the label.
- `Hint`: string — Helper text shown below the input (hidden while an error is displayed).
- `HintRight`: string — Optional hint aligned to the right of the label row (e.g. a char counter).
- `Label`: string — Label text shown above the input.
- `Required`: bool = false — When true, marks the field as required (adds the required indicator on the label). Default false.
- `ValidationFor`: Expression<Func<object>> — Lambda pointing at the bound model field (e.g. () => model.Email). When provided AND an EditContext is in scope, the first validation message for the field is shown automatically.
Slots:
- `LabelContent`: RenderFragment — Custom label markup; rendered instead of Label when provided.

### OmniListBox
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniListBox.razor_

Parameters:
- `AriaLabel`: string — aria-label do listbox.
- `DescriptionSelector`: Func<TValue, string> — Texto auxiliar opcional abaixo do label de cada item.
- `DisabledSelector`: Func<TValue, bool> — Item-by-item: retorne true para desabilitar este item específico.
- `IconSelector`: Func<TValue, string> — Nome do ícone exibido à esquerda de cada item. Default = sem ícone.
- `Items`: IEnumerable<TValue> — Itens a renderizar.
- `MaxHeight`: string — Altura máxima (CSS). Default 240px. Quando excede, scroll vertical.
- `Multiple`: bool — Quando true, permite selecionar múltiplos itens.
- `TextSelector`: Func<TValue, string> — Texto principal de cada item. Default = item.ToString().
- `ValueSelector`: Func<TValue, TValue> — Extrai o valor de bind de cada item. Default = o próprio item (identidade).
- `Values`: IEnumerable<TValue> — Multi-select bind. Use com Multiple=true.
Events:
- `ValuesChanged`: EventCallback<IEnumerable<TValue>> — Disparado quando a seleção múltipla muda (modo Multiple).

### OmniMaskedTextBox
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniMaskedTextBox.razor_

Parameters:
- `Autocomplete`: string — HTML autocomplete attribute for the input.
- `KeepMask`: bool = false — When true, the bound Value keeps the mask separators; default false binds only the meaningful characters.
- `Mask`: string *required* =  — Mask pattern: 9 = digit, A = letter, * = alphanumeric; any other char is a literal separator. Required.
- `Placeholder`: string — Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Visual size of the input. Default Md.

### OmniMultiSelect
Select múltiplo no estilo de chips dentro de um campo + popup com a lista de opções.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniMultiSelect.razor_

Parameters:
- `DescriptionSelector`: Func<TValue, string> — Texto auxiliar opcional de cada item na lista.
- `Disabled`: bool — Desabilita o campo (sem abrir popover nem remover chips). Default false.
- `DisabledSelector`: Func<TValue, bool> — Item-by-item: retorne true para desabilitar este item específico.
- `IconSelector`: Func<TValue, string> — Nome do ícone exibido à esquerda de cada item na lista.
- `Items`: IEnumerable<TValue> — Itens disponíveis para seleção.
- `Name`: string — Nome lógico — registra com OmniForm para validators irmãos (<OmniRequiredValidator Component="..." />).
- `Placeholder`: string — Texto exibido no campo quando nada está selecionado.
- `PopoverMaxHeight`: string — Altura máxima da lista dentro do popover.
- `PopoverWidth`: string — Largura do popover. Default vazio = mesma do trigger.
- `SearchPlaceholder`: string — Placeholder do campo de busca. Default "Buscar...".
- `Searchable`: bool — Habilita campo de busca dentro do popover.
- `ShowClearAll`: bool — Mostra botão "Limpar seleção (N)" no rodapé do popover.
- `TextSelector`: Func<TValue, string> — Texto principal de cada item. Default = item.ToString().
- `ValueSelector`: Func<TValue, TValue> — Extrai o valor de bind de cada item. Default = o próprio item (identidade).
- `Values`: IEnumerable<TValue> — Coleção selecionada (two-way via @bind-Values).
- `ValuesExpression`: Expression<Func<IEnumerable<TValue>>> — Expression pra integração com EditContext (validators irmãos).
Events:
- `ValuesChanged`: EventCallback<IEnumerable<TValue>> — Disparado quando a seleção muda.

### OmniNumeric
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniNumeric.razor_

Parameters:
- `Decimals`: int — Number of decimal places shown when the input loses focus. Default = inferred from TValue.
- `Format`: string — Custom ToString format for the display value (e.g. "00" for 2-digit zero-padded, "0,000" for thousands grouping). When set, wins over the default "N{Decimals}".
- `Max`: decimal — Maximum allowed value; entries above it are clamped. Default null (no maximum).
- `Min`: decimal — Minimum allowed value; entries below it are clamped. Default null (no minimum).
- `Placeholder`: string — Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.
- `Prefix`: string — Text rendered before the input (e.g. "R$"). Default none.
- `ShowSpinButtons`: bool — Show the up/down stepper buttons. Default true (hidden when ReadOnly).
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} — Visual size of the input. Default Md.
- `Step`: decimal — Increment applied by the spin buttons and ArrowUp/ArrowDown. Default 1.
- `Suffix`: string — Text rendered after the input (e.g. "%", "kg"). Default none.
- `Wrap`: bool — When true, stepping past Max wraps to Min and vice versa. Useful for cyclical inputs (hours, minutes, day of week). Requires both Min and Max to be set.

### OmniPassword
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniPassword.razor_

Parameters:
- `Autocomplete`: string = current-password — HTML autocomplete attribute. Default "current-password".
- `MinLength`: int — Minimum length enforced via the input's minlength attribute. Default null (none).
- `Placeholder`: string — Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.
- `ShowToggle`: bool = true — Show the eye button that toggles between masked and plain text. Default true.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Visual size of the input. Default Md.

### OmniPasswordStrength
Password strength meter + configurable requirement checklist.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniPasswordStrength.razor_

Parameters:
- `LabelText`: string = Força da senha — Caption text on the label line. Default "Força da senha".
- `MinLength`: int = 8 — Minimum length rule. Set to 0 to drop the length rule. Default 8.
- `Password`: string — The password to evaluate (read-only; this component never owns the value).
- `RequireDigit`: bool = true — Require a digit (default rule). Default true.
- `RequireLowercase`: bool = true — Require a lowercase letter (default rule). Default true.
- `RequireSymbol`: bool = true — Require a non-alphanumeric symbol (default rule). Default true.
- `RequireUppercase`: bool = true — Require an uppercase letter (default rule). Default true.
- `RequiredUniqueChars`: int = 0 — Require at least N distinct characters (default rule). 0 disables it.
- `Rules`: IEnumerable<OmniPasswordRule> — Fully custom rule set. When provided, the built-in toggles above are ignored.
- `ShowLabel`: bool = true — Show the strength word + caption line. Default true.
- `ShowRules`: bool = true — Show the per-rule checklist. Default true.

### OmniPickList
OmniPickList — a dual-list "transfer" picker (RadzenPickList port).
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniPickList.razor_

Parameters:
- `AllowFiltering`: bool — Show a search box above each list. Default false.
- `AllowMoveAll`: bool — Show the "move all" (double-arrow) buttons. Default true.
- `ButtonSize`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} — Size of the transfer buttons. Default Sm.
- `ButtonVariant`: ButtonVariant {Default | Primary | Ghost | Danger | Link} — Variant of the transfer buttons. Default Default.
- `Disabled`: bool — Disable the whole control.
- `DisabledSelector`: Func<TItem, bool> — Maps an item to whether it is disabled (non-selectable).
- `FilterPlaceholder`: string — Placeholder for the filter boxes.
- `IconSelector`: Func<TItem, string> — Maps an item to an optional leading icon name.
- `ListHeight`: string — Max height of each list (CSS length). Default "260px".
- `Orientation`: Orientation {Horizontal | Vertical} — Layout: Horizontal (lists side by side) or Vertical (stacked).
- `ShowHeader`: bool — Show pane headers. Default true.
- `Source`: IEnumerable<TItem> — Items in the left (source) list. Two-way bindable.
- `SourceEmptyText`: string — Text shown when the source list is empty.
- `SourceTitle`: string — Title text for the source pane header.
- `Target`: IEnumerable<TItem> — Items in the right (target) list. Two-way bindable.
- `TargetEmptyText`: string — Text shown when the target list is empty.
- `TargetTitle`: string — Title text for the target pane header.
- `TextSelector`: Func<TItem, string> — Maps an item to its display text. Defaults to ToString().
Events:
- `Moved`: EventCallback<PickListMoveEventArgs<TItem>> — Raised after a move, once Source/Target already reflect it.
- `SourceChanged`: EventCallback<IEnumerable<TItem>> — Fires when the source list changes after a move. Two-way via @bind-Source.
- `TargetChanged`: EventCallback<IEnumerable<TItem>> — Fires when the target list changes after a move. Two-way via @bind-Target.
Slots:
- `SourceHeader`: RenderFragment — Custom markup for the source pane header; overrides SourceTitle.
- `TargetHeader`: RenderFragment — Custom markup for the target pane header; overrides TargetTitle.

### OmniQtyStepper
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniQtyStepper.razor_

Parameters:
- `Max`: int — Limite superior (inclusivo). Opcional; quando definido, o botão + desabilita ao atingir.
- `Min`: int = 1 — Limite inferior (inclusivo). Default 1 — o botão − desabilita ao atingir.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Tamanho visual. Sm (24×24), Md (28×28, default), Lg (36×36).

### OmniRadio
Single radio button; registers with the enclosing OmniRadioGroup via cascading parameter.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniRadio.razor_

Parameters:
- `Disabled`: bool — Disables this radio (also disabled when the group is disabled). Default false.
- `Label`: string — Text label shown next to the radio when no ChildContent is provided.
- `Value`: TValue *required* — Value this radio represents; the group is selected when it equals the group's bound value. Required.

### OmniRadioGroup
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniRadioGroup.razor_

Parameters:
- `Orientation`: Orientation {Horizontal | Vertical} — Layout direction of the radios. Default Vertical.
Slots:
- `ChildContent`: RenderFragment — The OmniRadio children that make up the group.

### OmniRating
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniRating.razor_

Parameters:
- `AllowClear`: bool = false — Clique na estrela já selecionada limpa o valor (volta a 0). Default false.
- `AriaLabel`: string — aria-label customizado.
- `Color`: string — Cor accent override (qualquer CSS color). Default --omni-warn (dourado).
- `EmptyIconName`: string = star — Nome do ícone para estado vazio. Default star.
- `FullIconName`: string = star — Nome do ícone para estado preenchido. Default star (mesmo ícone, cor diferente).
- `HalfStep`: bool = false — Permite valores fracionados (X.5). Hover na metade esquerda da estrela.
- `Max`: int = 5 — Quantidade total de estrelas. Default 5.
- `ShowValue`: bool = false — Mostra o valor numérico ao lado das estrelas.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Tamanho do ícone das estrelas.
- `ValueFormatter`: Func<double, string> — Formatador customizado do label numérico. Default v.ToString("0.#").

### OmniSecurityCode
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSecurityCode.razor_

Parameters:
- `AriaLabel`: string = Dígito — Accessible label prefix for each cell (e.g. "Dígito 1"). Default "Dígito".
- `Count`: int = 4 — Number of code cells. Default 4.
- `Gap`: string = 8px — Gap between cells (CSS length). Default 8px.
- `Type`: SecurityCodeType {Text | Numeric | Password} = Text — Input type: Text (any char), Numeric (digits only) or Password (masked).

### OmniSelect
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSelect.razor_

Parameters:
- `Clearable`: bool — Show a clear (×) button when a value is selected. Default false.
- `EmptyText`: string — Text shown when there are no items.
- `Items`: IEnumerable<TValue> — Options to choose from.
- `Placeholder`: string — Text shown in the trigger when nothing is selected.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} — Control height/typography. Default Md (matches the other inputs).
- `TextSelector`: Func<TValue, string> — Maps an item to its display text. Default = item.ToString().
- `ValueSelector`: Func<TValue, TValue> — Extracts the bound value from an item. Default = the item itself.
Slots:
- `ChildContent`: RenderFragment — Kept for API compatibility. Prefer Items + selectors.

### OmniSlider
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSlider.razor_

Parameters:
- `AriaLabel`: string — aria-label do thumb (modo single).
- `Color`: string — Cor accent custom para a track ativa e thumbs. Default --omni-accent.
- `Marks`: IEnumerable<SliderMark> — Marcas customizadas (ex: 0%, 25%, 50%...) renderizadas abaixo da track.
- `Max`: double = 100 — Valor máximo. Default 100.
- `Min`: double = 0 — Valor mínimo. Default 0.
- `Range`: bool = false — Quando true, renderiza 2 thumbs (range).
- `ShowTicks`: bool = false — Mostra ticks (pontos pequenos) em cada Step. Auto-desliga se houver mais de 50 ticks para evitar poluição visual.
- `ShowValueLabel`: bool = true — Mostra balão com o valor sobre o thumb.
- `Step`: double = 1 — Incremento mínimo. Default 1.
- `ValueEnd`: double = 0 — Range end (thumb direito). Use com Range=true.
- `ValueFormatter`: Func<double, string> — Formatador customizado para o balão do thumb. Default: v.ToString("0.##").
- `ValueStart`: double = 0 — Range start (thumb esquerdo). Use com Range=true.
Events:
- `ValueEndChanged`: EventCallback<double> — Disparado quando o thumb final (end) muda. Two-way via @bind-ValueEnd.
- `ValueStartChanged`: EventCallback<double> — Disparado quando o thumb inicial (start) muda. Two-way via @bind-ValueStart.

### OmniSpeechToTextButton
Botão pronto pra falar — wrapper visual de conveniência por cima do headless OmniSpeechToText.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSpeechToTextButton.razor_

Parameters:
- `AllowInterrupt`: bool = false — Permite clicar o botão mesmo em estado Busy (Starting/Stopping). Default false — espera transição completar. true = cliques rápidos passam pro JS (que já tem debounce de 250ms).
- `BusyIcon`: string = loader — Ícone em transição (Connecting/Stopping). Default "loader".
- `BusyText`: string — (Obsoleto — use ConnectingText.) Texto genérico de transição, mantido por compatibilidade. Se setado, sobrescreve ConnectingText e StoppingText.
- `BusyTitle`: string = Aguarde… — Tooltip durante transição (Connecting/Stopping).
- `ConnectingText`: string = Conectando… — Texto durante Connecting (aguardando mic ficar pronto). Default "Conectando…". Crítico no Edge — mostra que ainda NÃO está ouvindo enquanto Microsoft Speech estabelece conexão.
- `Continuous`: bool = true — Continua reconhecendo até o user parar. Default true.
- `Disabled`: bool = false — Desabilita o botão manualmente (além de desabilitar quando o browser não suporta). Default false.
- `ErrorIcon`: string = alert-circle — Ícone em erro. Default "alert-circle".
- `Icon`: string = mic — Ícone idle (não gravando). Default "mic".
- `InterimResults`: bool = false — Dispara OnResult com resultados parciais enquanto o user fala. Default false.
- `Language`: string — Código de idioma BCP-47 ("pt-BR", "en-US"...). Null = padrão do browser.
- `MaxAlternatives`: int = 1 — Quantas alternativas pedir ao motor por trecho. Default 1.
- `RecordingText`: string — Texto durante gravação (mic capturando). Default = Text.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Tamanho do botão. Default Md.
- `StopIcon`: string = stop-circle — Ícone gravando. Default "stop-circle".
- `StopTitle`: string = Pressione para parar — Tooltip + aria-label gravando.
- `StoppingText`: string = Parando… — Texto durante Stopping. Default "Parando…".
- `Text`: string — Texto idle. Vazio + RecordingText vazio = botão icon-only.
- `Title`: string = Pressione para falar — Tooltip + aria-label idle.
- `UnsupportedTitle`: string = Reconhecimento de voz não disponível neste navegador — Tooltip quando browser não suporta Web Speech API.
- `Variant`: ButtonVariant {Default | Primary | Ghost | Danger | Link} = Default — Variante visual do botão. Default Default.
Events:
- `OnEnd`: EventCallback — Disparado quando o reconhecimento termina.
- `OnError`: EventCallback<string> — Disparado em erro, com o código cru do browser.
- `OnResult`: EventCallback<SpeechRecognitionResult> — Disparado a cada resultado do reconhecimento (transcript + IsFinal + confidence).
- `OnStart`: EventCallback — Disparado quando o reconhecimento começa.
- `OnStateChange`: EventCallback<SpeechRecognitionState> — Disparado a cada transição da state machine de reconhecimento.

### OmniSwitch
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSwitch.razor_

Parameters:
- `Label`: string — Text label shown next to the switch when no ChildContent is provided.
Slots:
- `ChildContent`: RenderFragment — Custom label content; rendered instead of Label when provided.

### OmniTagInput
OmniTagInput — entrada de múltiplos valores de texto livre (tags, e-mails, escopos, rótulos).
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniTagInput.razor_

Parameters:
- `AllowCustom`: bool = true — Permite criar valores livres (fora das Suggestions). Default true. Quando false, só valores presentes em Suggestions são aceitos.
- `AllowDuplicates`: bool = false — Permite tags repetidas. Default false (ignora duplicatas).
- `CaseSensitive`: bool = false — Comparação sensível a maiúsculas (duplicatas/sugestões). Default false.
- `Disabled`: bool = false — Desabilita o campo (sem adicionar/remover tags). Default false.
- `Max`: int — Número máximo de tags. null = ilimitado.
- `MaxSuggestions`: int = 8 — Máximo de sugestões exibidas no painel. Default 8.
- `Name`: string — Nome lógico — registra com OmniForm para validators irmãos (<OmniRequiredValidator Component="..." />).
- `Placeholder`: string — Texto exibido no campo quando não há tags.
- `ReadOnly`: bool = false — Somente leitura — exibe as tags mas bloqueia edição. Default false.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Tamanho visual do campo. Default Md.
- `Suggestions`: IEnumerable<string> — Conjunto opcional de sugestões exibidas num painel ao digitar.
- `Values`: IEnumerable<string> — Tags atuais (two-way via @bind-Values).
- `ValuesExpression`: Expression<Func<IEnumerable<string>>> — Expression pra integração com EditContext (validators irmãos).
Events:
- `OnTagAdded`: EventCallback<string> — Disparado após uma tag ser adicionada, com o texto da tag.
- `OnTagRemoved`: EventCallback<string> — Disparado após uma tag ser removida, com o texto da tag.
- `ValuesChanged`: EventCallback<IEnumerable<string>> — Disparado quando a coleção de tags muda.

### OmniTextArea
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniTextArea.razor_

Parameters:
- `MaxLength`: int — Maximum number of characters allowed (via maxlength). Default null (no limit).
- `Placeholder`: string — Placeholder text shown when the textarea is empty.
- `Rows`: int = 4 — Visible number of text rows. Default 4.

### OmniTextBox
_base: FormComponent<T> · form input · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniTextBox.razor_

Parameters:
- `Autocomplete`: string — HTML autocomplete attribute for the input.
- `Clearable`: bool = false — When true, shows an "x" button to clear the value whenever it's non-empty.
- `LeadingIcon`: string — Icon name rendered inside the input on the left. Default none.
- `MaxLength`: int — Maximum length enforced via the input's maxlength attribute. Default null (none).
- `MinLength`: int — Minimum length enforced via the input's minlength attribute. Default null (none).
- `Placeholder`: string — Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.
- `ShowCharCount`: bool = false — When true (and MaxLength is set), shows a character counter below the field.
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Visual size of the input. Default Md.
- `TrailingIcon`: string — Icon name rendered inside the input on the right (suppressed when the clear button is shown). Default none.
- `Type`: string = text — HTML input type (e.g. "text", "email", "tel"). Default "text".
Events:
- `OnBlur`: EventCallback<FocusEventArgs> — Fires when the input loses focus.
- `OnKeyDown`: EventCallback<KeyboardEventArgs> — Fires on keydown in the input (e.g. to handle Enter).

### OmniTimePicker
Time picker.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniTimePicker.razor_

Parameters:
- `HourFormat`: string = 24 — "24" (default) or "12" — adds AM/PM toggle inline with the hour.
- `MinutesStep`: int = 1 — Increment for the minutes field. Default 1.
- `Name`: string — Nome lógico — registra com OmniForm para validators irmãos.
- `SecondsStep`: int = 1 — Increment for the seconds field. Default 1.
- `ShowSeconds`: bool = false — Show a seconds field in addition to hours and minutes. Default false.
- `Time`: TimeOnly — The selected time of day. Bind via @bind-Time.
- `TimeExpression`: Expression<Func<TimeOnly>> — Expression pra integração com EditContext + validators irmãos.
Events:
- `TimeChanged`: EventCallback<TimeOnly> — Fires when the time changes. Two-way via @bind-Time.

## Layout

### OmniAppBar
Barra superior/inferior do <c>OmniLayout</c>.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniAppBar.razor_

Parameters:
- `Bordered`: bool = true — Borda inferior. Default true.
- `ElevateOnScroll`: bool = false — Quando true, a sombra só aparece após o user rolar além do AppBar. Útil para AppBars transparentes em landing pages. Default false.
- `Elevated`: bool = true — Sombra fina abaixo. Default true. Quando ElevateOnScroll é true, a sombra só aparece após scroll.
- `Fixed`: bool = true — Não rola junto com o main. Default true.
- `HideOnScroll`: bool = false — Esconde a AppBar quando o user rola down no main; reaparece ao rolar up. UX padrão mobile (Twitter, Instagram). Default false.
- `Position`: BarPosition {Top | Bottom} = Top — Posição no layout. Default Top.

### OmniAppearanceToggle
Theme mode switcher — Light / Dark / System.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniAppearanceToggle.razor_

Parameters:
- `AriaLabel`: string — aria-label do grupo. Default "Modo de aparência".
- `ButtonVariant`: ButtonVariant {Default | Primary | Ghost | Danger | Link} = Default — Variant do OmniButton interno (Dropdown/Cycle). Default Default.
- `DarkIcon`: string = moon — Ícone do modo Dark. Default "moon".
- `DarkLabel`: string = Escuro — Texto/label do modo Dark. Default "Escuro".
- `LightIcon`: string = sun — Ícone do modo Light. Default "sun".
- `LightLabel`: string = Claro — Texto/label do modo Light. Default "Claro".
- `ShowLabels`: bool = false — Mostra label de texto junto do ícone. Default false (icon-only).
- `Size`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Tamanho do botão. Default Md.
- `SystemIcon`: string = monitor — Ícone do modo System. Default "monitor".
- `SystemLabel`: string = Sistema — Texto/label do modo System. Default "Sistema".
- `Variant`: AppearanceToggleVariant {Dropdown | Segmented | Cycle} = Dropdown — Visual do toggle. Default Dropdown.
Events:
- `OnModeChanged`: EventCallback<ThemeMode> — Disparado quando o modo muda.

### OmniAuthLayout
Auth page scaffold — centered card by default; pass a Brand fragment to get the split layout (dark brand panel + form panel).
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniAuthLayout.razor_

Parameters:
- `Decor`: bool = true — Subtle grid + accent-glow background on the form area. Default true.
Slots:
- `Brand`: RenderFragment — When set, renders the dark brand side panel (split layout).

### OmniBanner
Persistent, app-wide message bar — sits above the layout chrome and stays until dismissed (unlike OmniAlert which lives inline in page content, and toasts which auto-dismiss).
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBanner.razor_

Parameters:
- `Dismissible`: bool = false — Show a dismiss (×) button.
- `Icon`: string — Override the leading icon.
- `Severity`: NotificationSeverity {Info | Success | Warning | Error} = Info — Intent — drives icon + tint. Default Info.
- `Sticky`: bool = false — Stick to the top of the scroll container.
Events:
- `OnClosed`: EventCallback — Fires after the banner is dismissed.
Slots:
- `Actions`: RenderFragment — Inline actions on the trailing edge.

### OmniBento
OmniBento — grade 2D densa (Bento).
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBento.razor_

Parameters:
- `AlignItems`: StackAlign {Start | Center | End | Stretch | Baseline} = Stretch — Alinhamento vertical dos tiles na célula (align-items do grid). Default Stretch.
- `Columns`: int = 12 — Número de colunas (mobile-first). Default 12. Ignorado quando MinTileWidth é definido.
- `ColumnsLg`: int — Override de Columns em ≥1440px. Default null.
- `ColumnsMd`: int — Override de Columns em ≥1024px. Default null.
- `ColumnsSm`: int — Override de Columns em ≥640px. Default null.
- `Connected`: bool = false — Visual "grudado" de 1px (tiles achatados, sem gap) — para telas operacionais densas. Default false.
- `Container`: bool = false — Responsividade por container query: colunas/spans reagem à largura do PRÓPRIO Bento (não do viewport), via um wrapper. Use para Bentos dentro de painéis/sidebars. Default false. (Alternativa ao MinTileWidth, que já é container-relativo.)
- `Dense`: bool = true — Empacotamento denso (grid-auto-flow: row dense). Default true. Defina false para preservar a ordem do DOM = ordem visual (foco/leitura quando os tiles são interativos).
- `EqualRows`: bool = false — Linhas de altura igual (grid-auto-rows: 1fr) — visual Apple alinhado. Vence RowHeight. Default false.
- `Gap`: int = 16 — Espaçamento entre tiles em px. Default 16 (estilo Apple). Ignorado quando Connected.
- `MinTileWidth`: int — Largura mínima do tile em px. Quando definido, usa auto-fit (repeat(auto-fit, minmax(MinTileWidth, 1fr))) — os tiles refluem pela largura do container sem breakpoints, e Columns é ignorado.
- `RowHeight`: int — Altura-base de cada linha do grid em px (grid-auto-rows minmax). Default null (altura por conteúdo).
- `Square`: bool = false — Remove o arredondamento dos tiles (cantos retos). Default false.

### OmniBentoItem
OmniBentoItem — tile tipado de um <c>OmniBento</c>.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBentoItem.razor_

Parameters:
- `AlignContent`: StackAlign {Start | Center | End | Stretch | Baseline} — Alinhamento (cross-axis) do conteúdo dentro do tile — torna o tile um flex column.
- `AspectRatio`: string — CSS aspect-ratio do tile (ex.: "1/1", "16/9"). Não combine com RowSpan/RowHeight.
- `ColSpan`: int = 1 — Quantas colunas o tile ocupa (base, mobile-first). Default 1.
- `ColSpanLg`: int — Override de ColSpan em ≥1440px. Default null.
- `ColSpanMd`: int — Override de ColSpan em ≥1024px. Default null.
- `ColSpanSm`: int — Override de ColSpan em ≥640px. Default null.
- `Disabled`: bool = false — Desabilita o tile interativo.
- `Href`: string — Torna o tile um link (renderiza <a>). Mutuamente exclusivo com OnClick.
- `JustifyContent`: StackAlign {Start | Center | End | Stretch | Baseline} — Distribuição (main-axis) do conteúdo dentro do tile — torna o tile um flex column.
- `NoPadding`: bool = false — Remove o padding interno do tile. Default false.
- `RowSpan`: int = 1 — Quantas linhas o tile ocupa (base). Default 1.
- `RowSpanLg`: int — Override de RowSpan em ≥1440px. Default null.
- `RowSpanMd`: int — Override de RowSpan em ≥1024px. Default null.
- `RowSpanSm`: int — Override de RowSpan em ≥640px. Default null.
- `Scrim`: bool = false — Adiciona um scrim (gradiente inferior) p/ texto sobre imagem full-bleed. Use com NoPadding.
- `Target`: string — Alvo do link quando Href é definido (ex.: "_blank").
- `Tone`: CardTone {None | Accent | Neutral | Info | Success | Warning | Danger} = None — Tom do tile — hero/accent + semânticos (tinta suave + borda). Default None.
Events:
- `OnClick`: EventCallback<MouseEventArgs> — Torna o tile um botão (renderiza <button>) quando definido e Href é nulo.

### OmniBrand
Logo/marca do app: quadrado com inicial + nome (e tenant opcional); vira link quando Href é definido.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBrand.razor_

Parameters:
- `Href`: string — Quando definido, renderiza a marca como link (<a href>); senão como <div>. Default null.
- `Initial`: string = F — Inicial exibida no quadrado da marca. Default "F".
- `Large`: bool = false — Usa o quadrado da marca em tamanho maior. Default false.
- `Name`: string = Forneria — Nome do app/marca exibido ao lado do quadrado. Default "Forneria".
- `Tenant`: string — Tenant/workspace opcional — renderiza " / Tenant" após o nome. Default null (oculto).

### OmniBreakpointProvider
Cascades the current <see cref="Breakpoint"/> to descendants so they can branch their markup on viewport size from C# (no CSS-only conditionals).
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBreakpointProvider.razor_

Parameters:
- `Breakpoint`: Breakpoint {Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl | Xxl} = Xs — Current breakpoint, cascaded to descendants. Two-way bindable via @bind-Breakpoint; updated on every viewport change. Default Md.
Events:
- `BreakpointChanged`: EventCallback<Breakpoint> — Fires whenever the active breakpoint changes. Enables @bind-Breakpoint.

### OmniCol
Coluna do grid 12-colunas.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniCol.razor_

Parameters:
- `Size`: int = 12 — Span padrão (mobile-first, sempre aplicado). 1–12. Default 12.
- `SizeLg`: int — Override em ≥1440 px.
- `SizeMd`: int — Override em ≥1024 px.
- `SizeSm`: int — Override em ≥640 px.

### OmniContainer
Wrapper centralizado com largura máxima responsiva.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniContainer.razor_

Parameters:
- `Fluid`: bool = false — Atalho para Full (sem limite). Default false.
- `Gutters`: bool = true — Padding lateral nas bordas. Default true.
- `MaxWidth`: ContainerMaxWidth {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl | Xxl | Full} = Lg — Largura máxima do container. Default Lg (1280px).

### OmniDrawer
Drawer / sidebar genérico — equivalente ao <c>MudDrawer</c> (MudBlazor),
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniDrawer.razor_

Parameters:
- `Anchor`: DrawerAnchor {Left | Right} = Left — Ancoragem do drawer no layout. Default Left.
- `AutoCloseOnNavigate`: bool = true — Se true (default), o drawer fecha automaticamente em modo overlay quando o usuário navega para outra rota. Útil em mobile — elimina boilerplate no AppShell consumidor.
- `Breakpoint`: Breakpoint {Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl | Xxl} = Md — Breakpoint a partir do qual o Responsive vira overlay. Default Md (~1024px).
- `Collapsed`: bool — Força modo collapsed (icon-only) independente da variante. Útil para Mini estático.
- `ExpandOnHover`: bool = false — Quando true, o drawer Mini expande on-hover (ficando full-width) e retorna ao icon-only quando o mouse sai. Útil para combinar densidade visual com acesso rápido aos labels. Default false.
- `MiniWidth`: string — Largura quando em modo Mini (icon-only). Default usa --omni-drawer-w-mini (72px).
- `Open`: bool = true — Estado aberto/fechado. Two-way binding com @bind-Open. Persistent: ignora (sempre visível); demais variantes: alterna visibilidade.
- `Persist`: bool = false — Quando true, persiste o estado Open em localStorage (chave omni.drawer.{Id} ou PersistKey). Sobrevive a F5 e navegação. Default false. Padrão shadcn/ui.
- `PersistKey`: string — Chave custom para persistência. Útil quando há múltiplos drawers e o Id auto-gerado mudaria entre sessões. Default null — usa o Id.
- `Variant`: DrawerVariant {Persistent | Mini | Temporary | Responsive} = Responsive — Variante de comportamento. Default Responsive.
- `Width`: string — Largura quando aberto. Default usa CSS var --omni-drawer-w (232px).
Events:
- `OpenChanged`: EventCallback<bool> — Notifica mudança do estado Open.
Slots:
- `Footer`: RenderFragment — Slot opcional renderizado no rodapé do drawer — após o ChildContent. Útil para card de plano/upgrade, link de logout, versão do app. Padrão Slack/Discord/shadcn.
- `Header`: RenderFragment — Slot opcional renderizado no topo do drawer — antes do ChildContent. Útil para logo do app, info do usuário, busca rápida. Inspirado em MudDrawerHeader.

### OmniDrawerToggle
Botão hamburger que alterna o estado de um <c>OmniDrawer</c>.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniDrawerToggle.razor_

Parameters:
- `Anchor`: DrawerAnchor {Left | Right} — Filtra drawers por âncora quando há mais de um no layout. Default null.
- `Icon`: string = menu — Ícone Lucide do botão. Default menu.
- `Target`: OmniDrawer — Referência manual ao drawer alvo. Default: usa resolução automática.
- `Title`: string = Abrir menu — Texto acessível (aria-label + title). Default "Abrir menu".

### OmniFooter
Footer slot do <c>OmniLayout</c>.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniFooter.razor_

Parameters:
- `Bordered`: bool = true — Borda superior fina. Default true.
- `Fixed`: bool = false — Fixa o footer ao rodapé da viewport (sticky). Default false (rola junto).

### OmniHidden
Renderiza condicionalmente subárvore baseado no breakpoint atual da viewport.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniHidden.razor_

Parameters:
- `Breakpoint`: Breakpoint {Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl | Xxl} = Md — Breakpoint que serve de pivô para a regra de visibilidade. Default Md.
- `Invert`: bool = false — Inverte a lógica de visibilidade. Útil para renderizar SOMENTE quando a regra de hide seria true.
- `Mode`: HiddenMode {Down | Up | Only} = Down — Modo de comparação: Down (default — esconde abaixo/igual ao breakpoint), Up (esconde acima/igual), Only (esconde apenas no breakpoint exato).

### OmniLayout
Container raiz do shell.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniLayout.razor_

Parameters:
- `SkipLabel`: string = Pular para o conteúdo — Texto do link de skip. Default "Pular para o conteúdo".
- `SkipTarget`: string = #main — Âncora do skip link. Default #main (o OmniMain renderiza um elemento <main> que pode receber esse id no consumidor via Class ou attributes).
- `SkipToContent`: bool = true — Renderiza um "skip to content" link visível apenas com foco por teclado (Tab no início da página). WCAG 2.4.1. Default true.

### OmniMain
Área principal de conteúdo do <c>OmniLayout</c>.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniMain.razor_

Parameters:
- `Container`: ContainerMaxWidth {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl | Xxl | Full} — Envelopa em OmniContainer com o max-width indicado. Default null (sem container).
- `NoPadding`: bool = false — Remove o padding interno padrão. Default false.

### OmniMasonry
OmniMasonry — layout em cascata (Pinterest): colunas de largura igual onde cada item mantém a altura natural e empilha na coluna mais curta, sem alinhar linhas.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniMasonry.razor_

Parameters:
- `Columns`: int = 3 — Número de colunas. Default 3. Ignorado quando MinColumnWidth é definido.
- `ColumnsLg`: int — Override de Columns em ≥1440px. Default null.
- `ColumnsMd`: int — Override de Columns em ≥1024px. Default null.
- `ColumnsSm`: int — Override de Columns em ≥640px. Default null.
- `Gap`: int = 16 — Espaçamento entre colunas e entre itens (px). Default 16.
- `MinColumnWidth`: int — Largura mínima da coluna em px. Quando definido, usa column-width — a contagem de colunas reage à largura do container, sem breakpoints — e Columns é ignorado.

### OmniPaneHeader
Fixed (non-scrolling) header band at the top of a pane — typically a
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniPaneHeader.razor_

Parameters:
- `Subtitle`: string — Subtítulo — renderizado como p com classe .omni-view-sub.
- `Title`: string — Título principal — renderizado como h1 com classe .omni-view-title.
Slots:
- `Actions`: RenderFragment — Ações à direita (ex.: OmniButton). Quando presente, ativa layout em 2 colunas.
- `Breadcrumb`: RenderFragment — Trilha de navegação contextual (ex.: OmniBreadcrumb) — renderizada acima do título.
- `Subtabs`: RenderFragment — Sub-tabs / período / segmento contextual (ex.: OmniSegmentedControl, OmniTabs) — renderizado abaixo do par título/ações, com margem dedicada.
- `TitleContent`: RenderFragment — Alternativa ao Title quando precisa de markup customizado no lugar do h1.

### OmniPaneToolbar
Fixed (non-scrolling) toolbar band — typically below <OmniPaneHeader>.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniPaneToolbar.razor_


### OmniParallax
OmniParallax — cena de parallax com camadas de profundidade.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniParallax.razor_

Parameters:
- `Axis`: ParallaxAxis {Vertical | Horizontal | Both} = Vertical — Eixo da translação das camadas (cascata; a camada pode sobrescrever). Default Vertical.
- `DisableBelow`: Breakpoint {Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl | Xxl} = Sm — Breakpoint até o qual (inclusive) o parallax fica desligado quando DisableOnMobile. Default Sm.
- `DisableOnMobile`: bool = true — Desliga em telas pequenas (mobile sofre com jank/CLS de barra de endereço). Default true.
- `Disabled`: bool = false — Desliga o parallax (camadas em repouso). Default false.
- `MouseParallax`: bool = false — Habilita parallax por ponteiro do mouse (desktop fine-pointer). Default false.
- `MouseStrength`: double = 1 — Intensidade do parallax de mouse (px ≈ 24 × valor por camada na velocidade 1). Default 1.

### OmniParallaxLayer
OmniParallaxLayer — uma camada de profundidade de um <OmniParallax>.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniParallaxLayer.razor_

Parameters:
- `Axis`: ParallaxAxis {Vertical | Horizontal | Both} — Eixo da translação. null = herda da cena (OmniParallax.Axis). Default null.
- `Range`: double = 300 — Amplitude total da translação em px (na velocidade 1). Default 300.
- `Speed`: double = 0.3 — Fator de parallax. 0 = preso ao scroll; >0 = primeiro plano (sobe ao rolar pra baixo); <0 = fundo (desce/recua). Quanto maior |Speed|, mais movimento. Default 0.3.

### OmniRow
Container grid 12-colunas responsivo.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniRow.razor_

Parameters:
- `Gap`: int = 16 — Espaçamento entre colunas e linhas (px). Default 16.

### OmniSplitAsideLabel
Small uppercase label used to group sections inside a <OmniSplitView> aside.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSplitAsideLabel.razor_

Parameters:
- `Text`: string — Label text. Used when no ChildContent is supplied. Default null.

### OmniSplitView
Generic master/detail layout primitive: an aside (sub-navigation) + main content column inside a positioned parent (usually a <OmniMain>).
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSplitView.razor_

Parameters:
- `AsideRight`: bool = false — Place the aside on the right instead of the default left.
- `AsideSize`: ComponentSize {Sm | Md | Lg | Xl} = Md — Aside width preset (Sm=200px, Md=228px, Lg=280px). Default = Md. Ignorado quando AsideWidth está setado.
- `AsideWidth`: string — Largura arbitrária do aside (ex: "380px", "25%", "20rem"). Quando setado, sobrescreve AsideSize. Útil para layouts POS, master/detail com proporções específicas, ou aside dimensionado por conteúdo. Pode ser sobrescrito via CSS pelo consumidor manipulando a custom property --omni-aside-w em media queries.
- `AutoCloseOnNavigate`: bool = true — Se true (default), fecha o overlay automaticamente em mobile quando o usuário navega — elimina overlay travado sobre a nova rota.
- `MobileBreakpoint`: Breakpoint {Xs | Sm | Md | Lg | Xl | Xxl} = Lg — Breakpoint a partir do qual o aside vira overlay (drawer mobile). Default Lg (~992px) — em telas menores que isso, mostra hamburger.
- `ShowMobileToggle`: bool = true — Quando true (default), renderiza o hamburger no canto top-left em mobile. Defina false se você tem AppBar com DrawerToggle próprio.
Slots:
- `AsideContent`: RenderFragment — Aside (sub-navigation) column content. Becomes an overlay drawer below MobileBreakpoint.
- `ChildContent`: RenderFragment — Main column content (scrollable). Typically a pane header/toolbar plus a body.

### OmniSplitter
N-pane resizable splitter.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSplitter.razor_

Parameters:
- `Height`: string = 100% — Altura CSS do container. Default "100%".
- `Orientation`: Orientation {Horizontal | Vertical} = Horizontal — Direção do split. Horizontal = panes lado-a-lado (drag horizontal). Vertical = empilhados (drag vertical).
- `ResetOnDoubleClick`: bool = true — Quando true, double-click na barra reseta os tamanhos dos panes para os valores iniciais (de Size). Quando o pane adjacente é Collapsible, double-click colapsa/expande (prioridade maior). Default true — espelha o comportamento do MudSplitPanel.
- `UseAsOverlay`: bool = false — Posiciona o splitter como overlay position: absolute preenchendo o pai. O elemento pai precisa ter position: relative. Equivalente ao UseAsOverlay do MudSplitPanel. Default false.
- `Variant`: SplitterVariant {Solid | Line | Gap} = Solid — Estilo visual da barra. Solid (default) = barra visível com grip dots — ideal para PDV, dashboards e telas de gestão. Line = hairline minimalista que vira accent no hover — ideal para IDE, editor de relatórios. Gap = espaçamento invisível — ideal para landing pages.
- `Width`: string = 100% — Largura CSS do container. Default "100%".
Events:
- `OnResize`: EventCallback<SplitterResizeEventArgs> — Disparado a cada tick do drag (use com moderação — pode disparar muito).
- `OnResizeEnd`: EventCallback<SplitterResizeEventArgs> — Disparado UMA vez ao soltar a barra. Use isso para persistir layout.

### OmniSplitterPane
Pane child of <OmniSplitter>.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSplitterPane.razor_

Parameters:
- `Collapsed`: bool = false — Two-way: is the pane currently collapsed?
- `Collapsible`: bool = false — Whether the pane can be collapsed via the bar's chevron buttons. Default false.
- `Max`: string — Maximum size ("%" or "px"). User can't drag the bar above this.
- `Min`: string — Minimum size ("%" or "px"). User can't drag the bar below this.
- `Resizable`: bool = true — Whether the pane can be resized via the adjacent bar. Default true.
- `Size`: string — Initial size — accepts "30%" or "200px". Null/empty = "auto" (the pane shares the remaining space equally with other auto panes).
Events:
- `CollapsedChanged`: EventCallback<bool> — Fires when Collapsed flips. Enables @bind-Collapsed.

### OmniStack
Container flex declarativo — equivalente a <c>MudStack</c> (MudBlazor) e
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniStack.razor_

Parameters:
- `AlignItems`: StackAlign {Start | Center | End | Stretch | Baseline} = Stretch — Alinhamento dos filhos no eixo cross (mapeia para align-items). Default Stretch.
- `Direction`: StackDirection {Column | Row} = Column — Direção do flex container. Default Column.
- `DirectionLg`: StackDirection {Column | Row} — Override em ≥1440px. Default null.
- `DirectionMd`: StackDirection {Column | Row} — Override em ≥1024px. Default null.
- `DirectionSm`: StackDirection {Column | Row} — Override em ≥640px. Default null (segue Direction).
- `Gap`: int = 8 — Espaçamento entre filhos em pixels. Default 8.
- `Justify`: StackJustify {Start | Center | End | Between | Around | Evenly} = Start — Distribuição dos filhos no eixo main (mapeia para justify-content). Default Start.
- `Wrap`: bool = false — Quebra de linha (flex-wrap). Default false.

### OmniSwipeArea
Detecta gestos de swipe (deslize) e dispara eventos com a direção e a distância.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSwipeArea.razor_

Parameters:
- `LiveTransform`: SwipeAreaLiveTransform {None | X | Y | Both} = None — Live drag direto pelo JS (60fps, bypassa Blazor SignalR). Quando setado (≠ None), o JS atualiza transform: translate(...) no elemento via CSS variable a cada pointermove. OnSwipeEnd continua disparando normalmente — você decide se faz snap, dismiss ou volta pra origem. Em None (default), só os eventos C# disparam (que ainda permitem live drag, mas via SignalR roundtrip).
- `PreventDefault`: bool = false — Quando true, anexa listeners JS não-passivos que chamam preventDefault(). Necessário para impedir o scroll da página durante swipes verticais em mobile. Default false.
- `Sensitivity`: int = 100 — Distância mínima (pixels) para disparar OnSwipeEnd. Swipes menores que isso são silenciosamente ignorados. Default 100.
Events:
- `OnSwipeCancel`: EventCallback<PointerEventArgs> — Disparado quando o pointer é cancelado (multitouch, etc.).
- `OnSwipeEnd`: EventCallback<SwipeEventArgs> — Disparado UMA vez no pointerup, se a distância arrastada (no eixo dominante) ultrapassou Sensitivity.
- `OnSwipeLeave`: EventCallback<PointerEventArgs> — Disparado quando o ponteiro SAI da área durante o arraste. Não reseta o estado automaticamente — o consumidor pode chamar Cancel se quiser abortar o gesto em curso.
- `OnSwipeMove`: EventCallback<MultiDimensionSwipeEventArgs> — Disparado A CADA pointermove durante o arraste. Inclui delta + direção em AMBOS os eixos (x e y). Ignora Sensitivity.

### OmniThemePicker
Dropdown pronto para trocar accent + dark/light/system.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniThemePicker.razor_

Parameters:
- `Accents`: IReadOnlyList<string> — Cores de accent oferecidas. Default: as 5 já suportadas (amber/emerald/blue/violet/crimson).
- `ShowDensity`: bool = true — Mostra a seção de densidade (Compacto/Padrão/Espaçoso) no dropdown. Default true. P3.3 — Layout density toggle.
- `Title`: string = Tema — Texto acessível do botão (aria-label / tooltip). Default "Tema".

### OmniToolBar
Faixa horizontal abaixo do <c>OmniAppBar</c>.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniToolBar.razor_

Parameters:
- `Bordered`: bool = true — Borda inferior. Default true.

## Marketing

### OmniEyebrow
Small uppercase kicker/label rendered above a heading, optionally preceded by an accent dot.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Marketing/OmniEyebrow.razor_

Parameters:
- `ShowDot`: bool = true — Renders the leading accent dot before the text. Defaults to true.
- `Text`: string — Text shown inside the eyebrow; ignored when ChildContent is provided.

### OmniHero
Marketing hero section composing an eyebrow, title, subtitle and a CTA row above arbitrary child content.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Marketing/OmniHero.razor_

Parameters:
- `Eyebrow`: string — Eyebrow text rendered in an OmniEyebrow; ignored when EyebrowContent is set.
- `Subtitle`: string — Subtitle paragraph rendered below the title; omitted when empty.
- `Title`: string — Hero title rendered as an h1; the value is treated as raw HTML (MarkupString). Ignored when TitleContent is set.
Slots:
- `CtaContent`: RenderFragment — Call-to-action markup rendered in a dedicated row below the subtitle.
- `EyebrowContent`: RenderFragment — Custom eyebrow markup; when set it replaces the Eyebrow text.
- `TitleContent`: RenderFragment — Custom title markup; when set it replaces the Title heading.

### OmniMosaic
Grid container that lays out OmniMosaicCard children into a responsive mosaic.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Marketing/OmniMosaic.razor_


### OmniMosaicCard
Single mosaic tile showing an optional icon plus a name and meta line, for use inside an OmniMosaic.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Marketing/OmniMosaicCard.razor_

Parameters:
- `Featured`: bool = false — When true, renders the card with inverted (filled accent) styling for emphasis. Defaults to false.
- `Icon`: string — Name of the OmniIcon rendered at the start of the card; omitted when empty.
- `Meta`: string — Secondary meta line shown below the name; omitted when empty.
- `Name`: string *required* =  — Primary label shown on the card. Required.
- `Wide`: bool = false — When true, the card spans two grid columns in the mosaic. Defaults to false.

## Navigation

### OmniBreadcrumb
Breadcrumb trail (`<nav>`): renders Items as "/"-separated links, with the last (or path-less) item shown as the current page.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniBreadcrumb.razor_

Parameters:
- `Items`: IEnumerable<Item> — Ordered trail of crumbs; each Item is a Text plus an optional Path (link). The last item renders as the current page.

### OmniExitPrompt
Intercepts navigation attempts when `When` returns true and asks the user to confirm.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniExitPrompt.razor_

Parameters:
- `CancelText`: string = Continuar editando — Label of the cancel (stay) button in the dialog.
- `ConfirmText`: string = Sair sem salvar — Label of the confirm (leave) button in the dialog.
- `Text`: string = Você tem alterações não salvas. Deseja sair mesmo assim? — Body message of the confirmation prompt (used by both the dialog and the native window.confirm).
- `Title`: string = Sair sem salvar? — Title of the confirmation dialog (DialogService path only).
- `UseNativePrompt`: bool = false — When true, uses the browser's native window.confirm instead of the Omni DialogService for in-app navigation. Default false.
- `When`: Func<bool> — Predicate that gates the prompt: navigation is intercepted only while it returns true. When null, the prompt is always active.

### OmniHotkey
Drop-in keyboard shortcut.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniHotkey.razor_

Parameters:
- `Combo`: string — Full combo spec string (e.g. "Ctrl+K", or "Ctrl+K|Meta+K" for alternatives). Takes precedence over Key/Modifiers when set.
- `Disabled`: bool = false — When true, the registration stays but the shortcut is inert; toggling this enables/disables in place without re-registering. Default false.
- `Key`: string — The base key (e.g. "K", "Escape") when not using Combo; combined with Modifiers to build the binding.
- `Modifiers`: Modifier {None | Ctrl | Alt | Shift | Meta} = None — Modifier flags (Ctrl/Alt/Shift/Meta) applied to Key. Default Modifier.None.
- `PreventDefault`: bool = true — When true, calls preventDefault on the key event so the browser default is suppressed. Default true.
- `StopPropagation`: bool = false — When true, stops the key event from propagating further. Default false.
Events:
- `OnPressed`: EventCallback<KeyboardEventArgs> — Invoked when the shortcut fires, with the originating KeyboardEventArgs.

### OmniMenuBar
Horizontal navigation bar — tab-style root items with rich dropdowns.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniMenuBar.razor_

Parameters:
- `AriaLabel`: string = Menu — Accessible label for the navigation landmark.
- `Trigger`: MenuTrigger {Hover | Click} = Click — How a dropdown first opens — Click (default) or Hover.
Slots:
- `Aux`: RenderFragment — Optional content pinned to the right edge of the bar (status, etc.).

### OmniMenuBarItem
One node of a OmniMenuBar.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniMenuBarItem.razor_

Parameters:
- `ChildrenLabel`: string — Optional section label rendered at the top of this item's flyout (when it has children).
- `Count`: int — Numeric badge shown on a root tab.
- `Description`: string — Secondary description line (dropdown row).
- `Disabled`: bool = false — Disables the item.
- `FooterKbd`: string — Footer keyboard hint.
- `FooterPath`: string — Footer link URL. If unset, the footer raises OnFooter.
- `FooterText`: string — Footer link text for a list dropdown.
- `GroupLabel`: string — Uppercase section label rendered above this dropdown row.
- `Icon`: string — Optional icon name.
- `Match`: NavLinkMatch {Prefix | All} = Prefix — Active-route match mode for Path.
- `Meta`: string — Metadata pill text (dropdown row).
- `MetaKind`: MenuMetaKind {Neutral | Accent | Good | Warn | Danger} = Neutral — Colour of the metadata pill.
- `Path`: string — Navigation URL. Ignored when the item has a dropdown.
- `Text`: string =  — Label text.
Events:
- `OnClick`: EventCallback — Click handler for items without a Path or dropdown.
- `OnFooter`: EventCallback — Footer click handler when FooterPath is unset.
Slots:
- `DropdownContent`: RenderFragment — Custom dropdown panel (mega-menu) — replaces nested items.

### OmniPagination
Standalone pager — use anywhere outside of DataGrid (cards, timelines, custom lists).
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniPagination.razor_

Parameters:
- `Compact`: bool = false — If true, hides numeric buttons and shows just "N / Total" between the arrows.
- `CurrentPage`: int = 0 — Current zero-based page index (clamped to the valid range). Two-way bindable via @bind-CurrentPage.
- `MaxVisible`: int = 7 — Maximum number of numeric page buttons to show (excluding ellipsis). Default 7.
- `PageSize`: int = 10 — Number of items per page. Default 10.
- `ShowSummary`: bool = false — If true, shows the "1–10 de 200" summary to the left.
- `TotalCount`: int = 0 — Total number of items across all pages; used with PageSize to compute the page count and summary.
Events:
- `CurrentPageChanged`: EventCallback<int> — Raised when the page changes, carrying the new zero-based page index.

### OmniPanelMenu
Vertical navigation list (`<nav>`).
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniPanelMenu.razor_

Parameters:
- `SectionLabel`: string — Optional section label rendered above the menu (e.g. "WORKSPACE").

### OmniPanelMenuItem
One node of a OmniPanelMenu.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniPanelMenuItem.razor_

Parameters:
- `Count`: int — Numeric count pill (e.g. unread, items in queue).
- `CountKind`: MenuMetaKind {Neutral | Accent | Good | Warn | Danger} = Neutral — Color of the count pill.
- `CountText`: string — String count pill (e.g. "!", "74%", "NEW") — alternative to Count.
- `Disabled`: bool = false — Disables the item.
- `Expanded`: bool = false — Inline-accordion state for items with children (expanded sidebar mode).
- `Icon`: string — Optional icon name.
- `Match`: NavLinkMatch {Prefix | All} = Prefix — Match mode for the active-route highlight.
- `Path`: string — Navigation URL (leaf items only).
- `Text`: string =  — Label.
Events:
- `ExpandedChanged`: EventCallback<bool> — Raised when the inline-accordion expanded state toggles, carrying the new value.
- `OnClick`: EventCallback — Click handler for leaf items without a Path.
Slots:
- `TextContent`: RenderFragment — Optional rich label (e.g. with highlighted matches). Falls back to Text.

### OmniPanelMenuSection
Groups panel-menu items under an optional section heading.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniPanelMenuSection.razor_

Parameters:
- `Label`: string — Optional uppercase section heading rendered above the grouped items; when empty, no heading is shown.

### OmniSegmentedControl
Single-select segmented button group: renders Items as toggle buttons, highlighting the one matching Value.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniSegmentedControl.razor_

Parameters:
- `Items`: IEnumerable<Item<TValue>> — The selectable segments; each Item pairs a Value with its display Label.
- `Value`: TValue — Currently selected value; the matching segment renders as active. Two-way bindable via @bind-Value.
Events:
- `ValueChanged`: EventCallback<TValue> — Raised when a segment is selected, carrying the newly selected value.

### OmniStep
A single step inside an OmniStepper; renders no markup itself and registers with the parent stepper, which draws its header and body.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniStep.razor_

Parameters:
- `Description`: string — Optional secondary line shown under the title in the header.
- `Disabled`: bool = false — When true, the step's bubble/dot cannot be clicked. Default false.
- `Icon`: string — Optional icon name shown in the step bubble (replaces the number when the step isn't done).
- `Optional`: bool = false — When true, appends an "(opcional)" marker after the title. Default false.
- `Title`: string *required* =  — Step title shown in the header label. Required.
Slots:
- `ChildContent`: RenderFragment — The step's body content, rendered by the parent stepper only while this step is active.

### OmniStepper
Multi-step container.
_base: OmniComponentWithChildren · accepts ChildContent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniStepper.razor_

Parameters:
- `ActiveStep`: int = 0 — Zero-based index of the active step. Two-way bindable via @bind-ActiveStep.
- `CompleteText`: string = Concluir — Label of the final "complete" button shown on the last step. Default "Concluir".
- `Linear`: bool = true — When true, steps must be completed in order: you cannot jump forward past the next step or click a pending step. Default true.
- `NextText`: string = Próximo — Label of the "next step" button. Default "Próximo".
- `PrevText`: string = Voltar — Label of the "previous step" button. Default "Voltar".
Events:
- `ActiveStepChanged`: EventCallback<int> — Raised when the active step changes, carrying the new zero-based index.
- `OnComplete`: EventCallback — Raised when the complete button on the last step is clicked.

### OmniTabItem
A single tab inside an OmniTabs; renders no markup itself and registers with the parent, which draws the tab button and shows its body when active.
_base: OmniComponent · source: src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniTabItem.razor_

Parameters:
- `Icon`: string — Optional icon name shown before the title on the tab button.
- `Title`: string *required* =  — Tab label shown on the tab button. Required.
Slots:
